title: CHILD PASSENGER SAFETY SEATS - 211info
text: LAKE COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH CHILD PASSENGER SAFETY SEATS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides car seat inspections, help with installation, and car seats. 1250 S 9th Street Lakeview, OR 97630 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Varies by location Email (541) 947-6045 453 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 947-6045 ext 453 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: Free or low-cost DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Lake County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Child Passenger Safety Seat Inspections Child Passenger Safety Seats Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON HEALTH PLAN APPLICATION ASSISTANCE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION SPECIALTY MEDICINE - FLUORIDE VARNISH PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
